differentials.raw: Colloid cyst anterior + superior to cavum septi pellucidi

differentials.raw: Arachnoid cyst in region of quadrigeminal plate cistern

differentials.name: Choroid plexus cyst
differentials.raw: Choroid plexus cyst (most common, abnormal DWI in ⅔)

differentials.name: Enlarged perivascular spaces
differentials.raw: Enlarged perivascular spaces (typically multiple, clustered around basal ganglia)

differentials.name: Porencephalic cyst
differentials.raw: Porencephalic cyst (communication with lateral ventricle, surrounding gliosis)

differentials.name: Infectious cyst of neurocysticercosis
differentials.raw: Infectious cyst of neurocysticercosis (< 1 cm, partially enhancing)

context: √  curvilinear margins Intracranial Nonneoplastic Cyst Characteristics: √  no detectable wall / associated soft-tissue mass √  homogeneous signal intensity identical to CSF √  absence of surrounding edema / gliosis √  NO contrast enhancement
